## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and pivot the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **SEO Stalled:** The site is stuck at SERP \#12–\#24 for "AI recruiter" despite strong domain authority. Competitors succeed by ranking their homepages, supported by deep content clusters.
  - [**Content is the Blocker:** Current content is generic and AI-written, resulting in low engagement. This prevents the site from outranking competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** A new strategy will pivot to in-depth, thought-leadership content to build authority and outrank competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**GSC Access Granted:** Carly now has GSC access (`carly@growthx.ai`) to resolve a persistent indexing quota issue that was blocking new pages from appearing in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Competitive Analysis

  - **Problem:** The site is not ranking \#1 for "AI recruiter."
      - **SERP Position:** Fluctuates between \#12 and \#24.
      - **Discrepancy:** Carly's SEMrush report showed \#12, while Donald's showed \#24.
  - [**Root Cause:** Competitors (e.g., Rare Man, HeyMilo, Eightfold) rank their homepages by supporting them with deep content clusters (e.g., "What is AI Recruiting?").](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Conclusion:** The site's content is too generic to compete effectively.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### GSC Indexing Issue

  - [**Problem:** Carly is unable to request indexing for new pages in GSC due to a persistent "quota exceeded" error.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Diagnosis:** The issue appears to be related to user permissions, as Donald successfully submitted a page for indexing during the call.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Donald granted Carly full GSC access for the `alex.com` property to resolve the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** Current content is generic and AI-written, confirmed by Donald's AI detection tool. This leads to low engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to a more robust, in-depth content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build authority by creating thought-leadership content that addresses specific recruiter pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [**Model:** Use "Lovable" as a benchmark for high-quality, non-AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Process:** Marcel (GrowthX) and a new editor are collaborating on the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [**Structure:** Link top-of-funnel content to new mid/bottom-funnel guides to drive traffic to product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Share the competitive analysis report and competitor content examples with Donald.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Submit all unindexed URLs in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [Deliver a draft of the new content strategy by Monday night for Tuesday's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Share the Notion doc of hiring/TA/AI stats (Gartner, McKinsey, etc.) with Carly.](https://fathom.video/share/Xn7wdTcnFrHibnZ7zPxzBNWXBessssPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
